qa_pair.question: Run a full Monte Carlo simulation of the FIFA World Cup 2026 tournament. Which single national team has the highest probability of winning the title? Answer with the team's three-letter code.
Across the entire World Cup 2026 field, identify the team the server rates as the strongest (highest underlying rating). Which group letter is that team drawn into? Answer with a single letter A-L.
Using the server's neutral-venue match model, estimate a Brazil versus Mexico fixture. What is Brazil's win probability? Answer as a decimal rounded to two places (e.g. 0.42).
Predict a France versus England match at a neutral venue using the single-match predictor. What is the most likely exact scoreline? Answer in the form home-away, e.g. 2-1.
Compare the pitch characteristics of these four cricket venues: Wankhede, Chepauk, Eden Gardens, and Chinnaswamy. Which one has the highest batting-friendliness rating? Answer with the venue name.
Of these four cricket venues — Wankhede, Chepauk, Eden Gardens, and Chinnaswamy — exactly one is classified by the pitch model as a bowling pitch. Which venue is it? Answer with the venue name.

Build the optimal Dream11 fantasy team for a Mumbai Indians (MI) versus Chennai Super Kings (CSK) match played at the Wankhede pitch. Who does the optimizer designate as captain? Answer with the player's full name.
For an India versus Australia fixture at the Chinnaswamy ground, request the captain recommendation. Which player tops the ranked list of captain candidates? Answer with the player's full name.
In the World Cup 2026 tournament format this server simulates, how many teams advance out of the group stage into the first knockout round (the Round of 32)? Answer with a number.

Consider a neutral-venue match between two teams the model rates exactly equally. According to the match-outcome probabilities, is a draw MORE likely than either individual side winning? Answer True or False.
